headline: Efekta Education Group partners with ECC Co., Ltd. to revolutionise English language education in Japan
summary: Efekta Education Group has announced a landmark partnership with one of Japan's leading language and corporate education providers, ECC Co., Ltd. On July 1st, ECC will launch ECC Online Hyper Lessons, a cutting-edge English-learning solution, powered by Efekta's world-class education technology.

content.title: Efekta Education Group partners with ECC Co., Ltd. to revolutionise English language education in Japan
content.summary: Efekta Education Group has announced a landmark partnership with one of Japan's leading language and corporate education providers, ECC Co., Ltd. On July 1st, ECC will launch ECC Online Hyper Lessons, a cutting-edge English-learning solution, powered by Efekta's world-class education technology.

thumbnail.caption: Powering the next generation of education. (PRNewsfoto/Efekta Education Group)

headline: Morning Brief: Americans paid $8 billion extra for gas this month
summary: Nike's (NKE) quarterly results will lead the earnings calendar, and we'll be hearing about consumer sentiment and expectations from the Conference Board. A Job Openings and Labor Turnover Survey for February will provide a detailed, if delayed, snapshot of that month's sentiment from employers and employees.

content.title: Morning Brief: Americans paid $8 billion extra for gas this month
content.summary: Nike's (NKE) quarterly results will lead the earnings calendar, and we'll be hearing about consumer sentiment and expectations from the Conference Board. A Job Openings and Labor Turnover Survey for February will provide a detailed, if delayed, snapshot of that month's sentiment from employers and employees.

headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: CoreWeave, Microsoft, McCormick, Constellation, Biogen, Marvell, and More
summary: Stocks were rising Tuesday following a report that said President Donald Trump told aides he was willing to end the war in Iran even if the U.S. and its allies fail to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  The facility received an A3 rating from  Moody’s  marking the first time a loan backed by high-performance computing infrastructure has achieved investment-grade status.  Microsoft  advanced 1.6% after the tech giant said it would invest more than $1 billion in cloud and artificial intelligence infrastructure in Thailand between 2026 and 2028.

content.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: CoreWeave, Microsoft, McCormick, Constellation, Biogen, Marvell, and More

The facility received an A3 rating from  Moody’s  marking the first time a loan backed by high-performance computing infrastructure has achieved investment-grade status.  Microsoft  advanced 1.6% after the tech giant said it would invest more than $1 billion in cloud and artificial intelligence infrastructure in Thailand between 2026 and 2028.

headline: Nike’s (NYSE:NKE) Q1 CY2026 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
summary: Athletic apparel brand Nike (NYSE:NKE) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales were flat year on year at $11.28 billion. Its GAAP profit of $0.35 per share was 24.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Nike in focus: Earnings, SKIMS partnership, & turnaround progress
summary: Nike (NKE) reported third quarter results that beat estimates on the top and bottom lines.CFRA analyst Zachary Warring sits down with Yahoo Finance to share his take on the results, Nike CEO Elliott Hill, the company's collaboration with Kim Kardashian's SKIMS brand, and more.

content.title: Nike in focus: Earnings, SKIMS partnership, & turnaround progress
content.description:
Nike (NKE) reported third quarter results that beat estimates on the top and bottom lines.

CFRA analyst Zachary Warring sits down with Yahoo Finance to share his take on the results, Nike CEO Elliott Hill, the company's collaboration with Kim Kardashian's SKIMS brand, and more.
content.summary: Nike (NKE) reported third quarter results that beat estimates on the top and bottom lines.CFRA analyst Zachary Warring sits down with Yahoo Finance to share his take on the results, Nike CEO Elliott Hill, the company's collaboration with Kim Kardashian's SKIMS brand, and more.

headline: Dow skyrockets by over 1,100 points, stocks rally to end Q1 2026
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) switch into rally mode as all three of the major indexes skyrocket, including the Dow Jones Industrial Average increasing by a whopping 1,125 points (2.49%) and the Nasdaq Composite seeing nearly 800 points in daily gains (3.83%).Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre recaps the day’s market moves as the first quarter of 2026 comes to a close.

content.title: Dow skyrockets by over 1,100 points, stocks rally to end Q1 2026
content.description:
US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) switch into rally mode as all three of the major indexes skyrocket, including the Dow Jones Industrial Average increasing by a whopping 1,125 points (2.49%) and the Nasdaq Composite seeing nearly 800 points in daily gains (3.83%).

Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre recaps the day’s market moves as the first quarter of 2026 comes to a close.
content.summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) switch into rally mode as all three of the major indexes skyrocket, including the Dow Jones Industrial Average increasing by a whopping 1,125 points (2.49%) and the Nasdaq Composite seeing nearly 800 points in daily gains (3.83%).Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre recaps the day’s market moves as the first quarter of 2026 comes to a close.

headline: Stronger China Quarter And Turnaround Progress Could Be A Game Changer For Nike (NKE)
summary: Nike recently reported fiscal third quarter results that exceeded analyst expectations on both revenue and earnings, with Nike brand revenue reaching US$11.00 billion and China profitability outpacing forecasts despite ongoing softness in Converse and margin pressure. Management framed the quarter as further, but incomplete, progress in a broad turnaround under CEO Elliott Hill, highlighting actions to improve business “health and quality” alongside higher-profile initiatives such as the...
